prompt: Square 1:1 editorial wellness photograph in a bright minimalist cream-white studio. A woman in matching cream-colored loungewear in a gentle yoga preparation pose, framed in profile. Soft warm window light from the left. CAMERA-IN-MOTION blur — the entire frame carries soft directional smear from a fast lateral camera pan (left to right), nothing tack-sharp; the subject is the relative anchor but still softer than sharp; backgrounds are heavily smeared. Slight Dutch tilt ~6° clockwise. Documentary photojournalism aesthetic, fine 35mm grain, subtle halation. No text, no logos.
